Structuring College Access

The Market Segment Model and College Board Geomarkets

Ozan Jaquette

Karina Salazar

Crystal Han

UCLA

University of Arizona

Stanford University

Order number 488053 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; state = IL; SAT 1310 - 1600; GPA B- to A+.

RQ1: What is the composition of each Geomarket?

First-generation status by race for Chicago area Geomarkets, SAT score 1160 - 1300

Figure Notes:.
- Excludes students who have missing values for race or parental education. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+.

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions by first-generation status: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all first-gen-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal first-generation-status group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions by race and first-generation status: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Each lollipop shows the share of a racial/ethnic × first-generation subgroup contributed by a Geomarket. For each racial/ethnic group, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation contribution share. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

 RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in first-generation status composition after excluding Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in first-generation status composition after excluding Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s relative percent change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

 RQ1RQ1: What is the composition of each Geomarket?

Racial/ethnic composition of purchased student profiles by Geomarket, Bay Area

Figure Notes:
- Excludes students with missing values for race. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180.  RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Bay Area, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180.  RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Bay Area, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Bay Area, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448420 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 546946 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Bay Area, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Bay Area, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448420 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 546946 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in first-generation status composition after excluding Geomarket: Bay Area, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 448420 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 546946 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in first-generation status composition after excluding Geomarket: Bay Area, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 448374 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520. Order number 546945 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in first-generation status composition after excluding Geomarket: Bay Area, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Bay Area, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ1: What is the composition of each Geomarket?

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Chicago, SAT score 1020–1150

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 392833 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+. Order number 487984 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+

Figure Notes:
- Each lollipop shows the share of a racial/ethnic × first-generation subgroup contributed by a Geomarket. For each racial/ethnic group, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation contribution share. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 392833 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+.  RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1020–1150

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 392833 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+. Order number 487984 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1160–1300

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1310–1600

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 392835 (ordered 7/9/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1310 - 1600; GPA B- to A+. Order number 488053 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; state = IL; SAT 1310 - 1600; GPA B- to A+

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1020–1150

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 392833 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+. Order number 487984 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+

Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 392834 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300. Order number 488035 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1160 - 1300; GPA B- to A+

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in first-generation status composition after excluding Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1310–1600

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 392835 (ordered 7/9/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1310 - 1600; GPA B- to A+. Order number 488053 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; state = IL; SAT 1310 - 1600; GPA B- to A+

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Chicago, SAT score 1020–1150

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 392833 (ordered 7/10/2018): HS class 2019 OR 2020; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+. Order number 487984 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; state = IL; SAT 1020 - 1150; GPA B- to A+

RQ1: What is the composition of each Geomarket?

Purchased student profiles by racial/ethnic composition and first-generation status, Dallas area

Fullscreen

Figure Notes:
- Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 448427 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 448440 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520.

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Dallas, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

 RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Dallas, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Dallas, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448427 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1190 - 1260

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Dallas, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448440 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Dallas, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Dallas, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Detroit, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 484698 (ordered 7/25/2019); HS class 2021; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180.  RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Detroit, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 484698 (ordered 7/25/2019); HS class 2021; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Detroit, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448427 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 547005 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1190 - 1260.

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Detroit, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448440 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520. Order number 546978 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520.

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Detroit, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 484698 (ordered 7/25/2019); HS class 2021; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 484698 (ordered 7/25/2019); HS class 2021; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 484698 (ordered 7/25/2019); HS class 2021; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Fullscreen

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Long Island, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

 RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Long Island, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Long Island, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448427 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1190 - 1260

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Long Island, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448440 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Long Island, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Long Island, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ1: What is the composition of each Geomarket?

Purchased student profiles by racial/ethnic composition and first-generation status, Los Angeles area

Fullscreen

Figure Notes:
- Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 448420 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 546946 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260.  RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Los Angeles, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions by race and first-generation status: Los Angeles, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each lollipop shows the share of a racial/ethnic × first-generation subgroup contributed by a Geomarket. For each racial/ethnic group, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation contribution share. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448420 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260.  RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Los Angeles, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Los Angeles, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448420 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 546946 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Los Angeles, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448374 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520. Order number 546945 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Los Angeles, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 448374 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520. Order number 546945 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Los Angeles, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ1: What is the composition of each Geomarket?

Purchased student profiles by racial/ethnic composition and first-generation status, Northern New Jersey area

Fullscreen

Figure Notes:
- Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 448427 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 448440 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520.

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Northern New Jersey, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

 RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Northern New Jersey, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Northern New Jersey, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448427 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1190 - 1260

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Northern New Jersey, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448440 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Northern New Jersey, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Northern New Jersey, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Orange County, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Geomarket contributions by race and first-generation status: Orange County, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each lollipop shows the share of a racial/ethnic × first-generation subgroup contributed by a Geomarket. For each racial/ethnic group, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation contribution share. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180.  RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Orange County, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Orange County, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448420 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 546946 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Orange County, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Orange County, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Orange County, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ1: What is the composition of each Geomarket?

Purchased student profiles by racial/ethnic composition and first-generation status, Philadelphia area

Fullscreen

Figure Notes:
- Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 448427 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 448440 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520.

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: Philadelphia, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

 RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Philadelphia, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Philadelphia, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Philadelphia, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448440 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: Philadelphia, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: Philadelphia, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status. Order number 448922 (ordered 1/9/2019): HS class 2020; selected Geomarkets; PSAT 1070 - 1180

 RQ2RQ2: Where does each group come from?

Geomarket contributions to each racial/ethnic group: San Diego, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Gray bars show the share of all race-known purchased student profiles contributed by each Geomarket. Blue lollipops show the share of the focal racial/ethnic group contributed by each Geomarket. Geomarkets are sorted by Geomarket number. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure shows White, Asian, Black, and Hispanic groups; it excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Figure excludes Two+, non-Hispanic; AIAN, non-Hispanic; and NHPI, non-Hispanic groups. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180.  RQ3RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: San Diego, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: San Diego, PSAT score 1190–1260

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448420 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260. Order number 546946 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1190 - 1260

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Percentage-point change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: San Diego, PSAT score 1270–1520

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448374 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520. Order number 546945 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in racial/ethnic composition after excluding each Geomarket: San Diego, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in the racial/ethnic composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each racial/ethnic group. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity. Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 448374 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520. Order number 546945 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021 OR 2022; State = CA; PSAT 1270 - 1520

RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?

Relative percent change in first-generation status composition after excluding Geomarket: San Diego, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the relative percent change in first-generation status composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Order number 448375 (ordered 1/8/2019): HS class 2020; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180. Order number 546954 (ordered 1/6/2020): HS class 2021; State = CA; PSAT 1070 - 1180

Relative percent change is calculated as 100 × (remaining-pool share − full-pool share) / full-pool share. Positive values mean the remaining pool has higher relative representation than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has lower relative representation. Facet titles report the full-pool count and baseline share for each first-generation status group. Excludes students with missing values for first-generation status. Percentage-point change in race × first-generation composition after excluding Geomarket: San Diego, PSAT score 1070–1180

Figure Notes:
- Each point shows the percentage-point change in the race-by-first-generation composition of the remaining visible prospect pool after excluding the named Geomarket. Positive values mean the remaining pool has a higher share than the full metro pool; negative values mean the remaining pool has a lower share. Rows show racial/ethnic groups; columns distinguish first-generation and non-first-generation prospects. Within each racial/ethnic row, Geomarkets are sorted by the first-generation subgroup’s percentage-point change. Panel labels report the full-pool count and baseline share for each race-by-first-generation subgroup. Excludes students with missing values for race/ethnicity or first-generation status.
